synopsis: Hired to deliver a rare work of art to the planet Rendel for a million credits, Han Solo and Chewbacca arrive to find the wrecked ship of their old friend Karamu, whose failing droid warns them of an Emerald Witch before its power cells die. Venturing on alone, Han is snared by thorny vines and finds Karamu aged far beyond his years. A flower sprays gas that ages Han in an instant as the vines close around them both. The witch reveals she was cast out by her own sister, a queen who feared her, and planted the seed that grew into the deadly growth. As she promises the men will die feeding her plants, blaster fire rings out. Freed, and with Chewbacca now caught by the gas, Han hurls the *Tooka* statue at the witch. It bursts, releasing a gas that withers the vines and undoes her. The spell broken, Han, Chewie, and Karamu return to normal and escape, though a single surviving flower may still be tucked away in the *Millennium Falcon*'s cockpit.
title: Tales from Vader's Castle #3
